description: You are a public health bioinformatics scientist tracking an outbreak of colistin-resistant bacteria mediated by the mcr-1 gene. You have received assembled plasmid contigs from three hospital environmental swabs in ~/UGENE_Data/outbreak/environmental_swabs.fasta. To maintain data privacy, you must process these sequences locally using the UGENE graphical interface. Identify which swab (Hospital_Swab_A, Hospital_Swab_B, or Hospital_Swab_C) contains the mcr-1 gene by creating a local BLAST database named 'swabs_db' in ~/UGENE_Data/outbreak/blast_db/ and querying it with mcr_1_reference.fasta. Export the BLAST annotation track to ~/UGENE_Data/outbreak/results/mcr1_hits.gff and create a report at ~/UGENE_Data/outbreak/results/surveillance_report.txt explicitly identifying the contaminated swab. All operations must be performed within the UGENE GUI (external tools are located in /usr/bin/). Directly executing command-line BLAST tools will fail verification.
